title: Tick Control in Irvington, NY | $125-$325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Irvington, Westchester. Protect your family and pets from Lyme disease. Prices from $125-$325. Same-day service available!
intro: Irvington's tree-lined streets, proximity to the Hudson River, and abundance of parks and wooded areas create the perfect environment for ticks to thrive. Our professional tick control services protect Irvington families and pets from the dangers of Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses. With treatments ranging from $125 to $325, we provide comprehensive tick elimination and prevention for residential properties throughout this beautiful Westchester village.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Irvington and Westchester County for years with proven tick control methods that are safe for children and pets. Our licensed technicians understand the unique landscape challenges of Irvington properties—from riverside estates to historic neighborhoods—and customize treatments to provide maximum protection throughout tick season.
localContext: Irvington's scenic location along the Hudson River and near parks like Matthiessen Park and the Old Croton Aqueduct Trail means residents enjoy outdoor recreation but also face increased tick exposure. The village's mature trees, historic properties, and proximity to wooded areas require specialized tick control strategies to keep yards, gardens, and recreational spaces safe for families.

faqs.question: Why is tick control especially important in Irvington?
faqs.answer: Irvington's location along the Hudson River, abundance of wooded areas, and proximity to parks and trails create ideal tick habitats. With many residents enjoying outdoor activities at the Old Croton Aqueduct Trail and local parks, professional tick control is essential to prevent Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses that are prevalent in Westchester County.

faqs.question: What does the $125-$325 price range cover for tick control?
faqs.answer: Our pricing depends on property size and treatment scope. A typical quarter-acre residential property starts at $125, while larger estates or properties with extensive wooded areas may cost up to $325. All treatments include a thorough perimeter spray, vegetation treatment, and follow-up recommendations to keep your Irvington property tick-free.

faqs.question: When is the best time for tick control treatment in Irvington?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Irvington runs from early spring through late fall, with peak activity from April through September. We recommend starting treatments in early spring before ticks become active and continuing with monthly or bi-monthly applications throughout the season for optimal protection, especially if your property borders wooded areas or the river.

faqs.question: Are your tick control treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products that are highly effective against ticks but safe for children and pets when applied correctly. Treatments typically require 2-4 hours of drying time before the area is safe for family activity. Our technicians will provide specific instructions to ensure your Irvington home remains both tick-free and safe for everyone.
